deposit.verified: Your deposit of {amount} ETB has been verified and added to your capital. Your package is now active.
deposit.rejected: Your deposit of {amount} ETB was rejected. Reason: {reason}
deposit.pending: Your deposit of {amount} ETB is pending verification. We will review it within 24 hours.

withdrawal.approved: Your withdrawal of {amount} ETB has been approved and sent to your bank account.
withdrawal.rejected: Your withdrawal of {amount} ETB was rejected. Reason: {reason}. Amount has been refunded to your balance.
withdrawal.pending: Your withdrawal request for {amount} ETB is being processed. You will receive your funds within 24-48 hours.

suspension.banned: Your account has been permanently banned. Reason: {reason}. You cannot register again with this phone number.
suspension.suspended: Your account has been suspended. Reason: {reason}. Please contact support for assistance.

warning.received: You have received a warning. Reason: {reason}. This is warning #{count}. Continued violations may result in account suspension.

commission.referralReceived: You received {amount} ETB from a Level {level} referral deposit.
commission.taskReceived: You earned {amount} ETB from a Level {level} team member's task.

task.allCompleted: You completed all {count} tasks today and earned {amount} ETB. Come back tomorrow!
task.restDay: Tasks are not available today. Share your referral link and earn while you rest!
